name: Dual Arm Shared Workspace Collision Avoidance
description: A robotics engineer must design a multi-robot cell and implement a coordination strategy to prevent collisions in a shared workspace using the ZMQ Remote API (port 23000). Using the UR5 model ('/opt/CoppeliaSim/models/robots/non-mobile/UR5.ttm'), position Robot A at [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] and Robot B at [0.8, 0.0, 0.0]. Conduct a concurrent trial where both robots rotate their base joints into the shared space (A to +90° and B to -90°) until they collide, followed by a coordinated trial where they reach the same targets safely. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/trial_logs.csv (columns: trial_id, sim_time_s, robot_a_base_rad, robot_b_base_rad, collision_detected) and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/coordination_report.json (fields: concurrent_trial_collision, coordinated_trial_collision, coordination_strategy).
